tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Would Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Have का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had known, I would have come. If he had worked hard, he would have passed. If I had money, I would have bought this. If you had told me, I would have helped. If she had come early, we would have met.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Would Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If we had time, we would have won. If I had been there, I would have seen this. If they had paid attention, they would have understood. If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this. If you had listened, you would have learned.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "अगर वह सच बताता, तो हम खुश होते।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If he had told the truth, we would have been happy.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "If you had told me, I woulds have helped."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If you had told me, I would have helped.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Would Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Would Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had known this, I would not have done it. If she had asked me, I would have told her. If you had tried, you would have succeeded. If we had more time, we would have learned more.
